name: Agent Brain
description: Unified long-term memory via hosted agent-brain MCP (auto recall + capture)

apiKey.description: API key (maps to user_id on server). Use apiKey or jwt.

jwt.description: Bearer JWT (sub = user id). Use apiKey or jwt.

agentId.description: Fixed agent id (e.g. openclaw-alice). Overrides agentPrefix derivation.

agentPrefix.description: Prefix when deriving agent id from sessionKey (openclaw-alice-main)

autoCapture.description: Write durable facts after each agent run (agent_end)

recallMinPromptLength.description: Skip recall for very short prompts
